title: Geometric PDE, relativity, and fluid dynamics
summary: Elliptic and geometric PDE, scalar and boundary mean curvature problems, Einstein constraint equations, and fluid equations, including stability and reconstruction questions from partial observations.

title: Numerical analysis and geometric discretization
summary: Adaptive finite and boundary element methods, finite element exterior calculus, discrete exterior calculus, wavelet coordinates, and structure-preserving approximation of differential operators.

title: Approximation theory, adaptivity, and neural realization
summary: Nonlinear approximation, adaptive and multilevel methods, refinable systems, subdivision schemes, and exact neural-network realization of refinement algorithms.

title: Quantum fields and computational regularization
summary: Dynamical lattice regulators and computational approaches to quantum field theory, with attention to continuum symmetries, locality, positivity, and computable regularization.

title: Mathematical exposition, teaching, and computational tools
summary: Expository notes, bilingual teaching projects, calendar computations, and small computational tools for mathematics, physics, and scientific visualization.
